variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 5202 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 5202 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 5202 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Mann Filter C 32 191/1 Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 5202
variants.description: High-quality MANN-FILTER air filters for clean air intake and optimum protection for your engine, mass air flow sensor & other sensitive components / They meet requirements of modern engine technology. Highest dirt holding capacity and dirt separation efficiency, low flow resistance and high pleat stability ensure functional reliability during the entire service interval.

variants.title: Donaldson P615748 Air Filter, Panel | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 5202
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P615748 Air Filter, Panel is designed to provide reliable performance in air filter, panel applications. Built with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality and durability. Ideal for industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty environments, this component enhances system performance and longevity.
